reference: You have provided very little information. However, from the details you have given, it can be inferred that your repetitive and excessive thoughts are interfering with your daily life. If yes, then you may be suffering from Obsessive-Compulsive Disorder. Selective Serotonin Reuptake Inhibitors and behavioral therapy will help you a lot.
